hero.tagline: Graduated in Web and Multiplatform Application Development

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm a full stack developer trained in Web and Multiplatform Application Development. My focus is on building complete solutions that combine intuitive frontends with robust backends, always prioritizing performance and user experience.
about.detail: I'm passionate about learning new technologies and applying them to real-world problems. I've worked with Java, Spring Boot, Angular, React, TypeScript, and multiple databases across academic and personal projects. I'm currently looking for opportunities to keep growing as a developer and bring value to challenging projects.

descriptions.voluntapp: Volunteering platform that connects organizations with volunteers. Built with Spring Boot and Angular, it includes user registration, an admin panel, and activity management with interactive maps.
descriptions.ecoquest: Desktop application that gamifies sustainability through eco-friendly challenges. Developed with WPF and C#, with a Spring Boot backend, it lets you complete missions, earn points, and track environmental progress.
descriptions.kebab: Complete order management system for a kebab restaurant. Built with Spring Boot and MySQL, it features a product catalog, shopping cart, and real-time order tracking.

work-freelance.description: Development of complete web applications for small businesses and individual clients. Implementation of frontends with React and TypeScript, backends with Node.js and deployed in cloud environments.

work-practices-1.description: Professional internship at an IT company. Participation in the development and maintenance of internal web applications, collaboration in agile teams and technical support to users.

work-practices-2.description: Professional internship at an IT company. Participation in the development and maintenance of internal web applications, collaboration in agile teams and technical support to users.

edu-daw.description: Vocational training focused on modern web application development. Acquisition of skills in frontend, backend, databases and server deployment.

edu-dam.description: Advanced training in multi-platform application development. Focus on Kotlin for Android, WPF for desktop and cloud services with AWS.
